quality.rationale: 基于二维度规与曲率张量固有对称性进行缩并推导，逻辑链条完整且结论具普遍意义，但属纯微分几何模型缺乏具体物理观测背景

origin.question: Problem 9.7. In a space of fewer than 4 dimensions simple expressions can be given for the Riemann tensor.(b) Express the Riemann tensor for a 2-dimensional space in terms of the metric and the Ricci scalar.
origin.solution: (b) In two dimensions the relations, due to symmetries, among the components of the Riemann tensor may be summarized in any coordinate system as$$R_{\alpha \beta \gamma \delta} = (g_{\alpha \gamma} g_{\beta \delta} - g_{\alpha \delta} g_{\beta \gamma}) f$$but$$\mathbf {R} = \mathbf {R}_{\alpha \beta}^{\alpha \beta} = (\mathbf {g}_{\alpha}^{\alpha} \mathbf {g}_{\beta}^{\beta} - \mathbf {g}_{\beta}^{\alpha} \mathbf {g}_{\alpha}^{\beta}) \mathbf {f} = (4 - 2) \mathbf {f} = 2 \mathbf {f}.$$Thus, in any coordinate system$$\mathsf {R}_{a \beta \gamma \delta} = \frac {1}{2} \left(\mathsf {g}_{a \gamma} \mathsf {g}_{\beta \delta} - \mathsf {g}_{a \delta} \mathsf {g}_{\beta \gamma}\right) \mathsf {R} .$$
